elements.original_description: A cheerful cartoon American family standing together, holding shopping bags and smiling, with a thought bubble showing a stack of dollar bills labeled 'Thousands'. Pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a cheerful cartoon American family, including parents and children, standing close together and smiling broadly. The family is holding shopping bags. A stylized thought bubble emerges from the family, containing a neat stack of dollar bills clearly labeled 'Thousands'. Clean flat vector art, high contrast lines, no shading or gradients. Pure white seamless background. High-resolution, commercial style. No text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.

elements.original_description: A close-up of a credit card with a small pile of coins and a coffee cup beside it, symbolizing small purchases. Pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon, a close-up view of a single credit card lying flat. Beside it is a small, neat pile of coins and a simple coffee cup, symbolizing small daily purchases. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients. All items arranged aesthetically on a pure white seamless background. High-resolution, commercial style. No text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.
